name: Alderson Fci
description_short: FPC Alderson is a minimum-security federal prison camp operated by the Bureau of Prisons, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: FPC Alderson is a minimum-security federal prison camp located in Alderson, West Virginia, operated by the Federal Bureau of Prisons (BOP), a division of the U.S. Department of Justice. The facility is not a consumer finance provider of any kind. The website content reveals that this is a correctional institution housing 502 female inmates in the Mid-Atlantic Region. The miscategorization as a "payday-alternative" lender appears to stem from an automated data error, as the .gov website URL was likely flagged as a financial services endpoint. FPC Alderson provides standard prison administrative services including inmate visitation scheduling, mail processing, commissary account management, and legal resource access. The facility does not offer lending products, credit services, financial counseling, or any consumer finance solutions whatsoever. This entry represents a critical data quality issue in the CreditDoc database. Any consumer seeking financial assistance should immediately disregard this profile and seek legitimate financial institutions or non-profit credit counseling services instead. The correct classification for this entity would be as a government institution, which falls outside consumer finance entirely.
services: Commissary account management for inmate funds
Inmate legal resource access and documentation
Admissions and orientation handbook (English and Spanish)
Prison Rape Elimination Act (PREA) compliance audits and reporting
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
cons: This is not a consumer finance company—it is a federal prison facility with zero lending or financial services
Categorization as a payday-alternative lender is completely inaccurate and misleading
No financial products, services, or consumer credit offerings of any kind are available
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: This profile should be immediately removed from CreditDoc's consumer finance database. FPC Alderson is a federal correctional institution, not a financial services provider, and consumers searching for payday alternatives, emergency loans, or credit counseling will find no applicable services here.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
